steady.title: Steady Pulse
steady.message: Your co-parenting rhythm is stable. Consistency builds security for everyone.

critical.title: Action Needed
critical.message: Schedule is currently lopsided. Consider renegotiating days for better balance.

attention.title: Uneven Rhythm
attention.message: Minor friction detected. A small adjustment could help.

coparenting.strong: You're maintaining strong custody time across all periods. Keep up the consistent presence!
coparenting.promising: Recent improvements are promising! This week and month show positive trends, though the year overall needs attention. Continue this momentum.
coparenting.belowTarget: Custody time is below target across all periods. Consider discussing schedule adjustments with your co-parent.
coparenting.mixed: Mixed trends detected. Focus on maintaining consistency week-to-week for better long-term balance.
coparenting.lowerWeek: This week is lower than usual, but your year-to-date average is solid. Temporary dip or pattern change?

insights.lateNightSubtext: Impulse control is lowest at night. Avoid late browsing.
insights.weekendSplurgeTitle: Weekend spending is 2.5x higher than weekdays.
insights.weekendSplurgeSubtext: You are undoing your weekday discipline on Saturdays.
insights.goalFailSubtext: Detected €{{amount}} spent on restricted items this month.
insights.categoryDriftSubtext: This is unsustainable. Cut back immediately.
insights.budgetExceededSubtext: Stop spending. You have 0 disposable income left.
insights.budgetWarningSubtext: You must average <€{{dailyLimit}}/day to survive the month.
insights.custodySubtext: Ensure fridge is stocked and activities planned.
insights.optimalSubtext: No spending anomalies or goal violations detected.
insights.scanMore: Scan more receipts to generate insights.
insights.exceeded: You have exceeded your monthly budget.
insights.approaching: You are approaching your budget limit.
insights.higher: Recent spending is higher than average.
insights.lower: You are spending less than usual.

goalSetter.title: Goal Setter
goalSetter.description: You've enabled goal tracking to monitor your spending habits. Keep it up!

budgetMaster.title: Budget Master
budgetMaster.description: Excellent work! You've stayed under 90% of your monthly budget.

budgetHero.title: Budget Hero
budgetHero.description: Outstanding! You're using less than 75% of your budget. You're a budgeting champion!

frugalGenius.title: Frugal Genius
frugalGenius.description: Incredible! You've used less than half your budget. You're a master of frugality!

trendSetter.title: Trend Setter
trendSetter.description: Your spending this week is lower than last week. Great progress!

downwardSpiral.title: Downward Spiral
downwardSpiral.description: Amazing! You've reduced spending by over 20% this week. Keep the momentum!

consistentTracker.title: Consistent Tracker
consistentTracker.description: You've been consistently tracking your expenses. Well done!

dailyLogger.title: Daily Logger
dailyLogger.description: You've tracked expenses on 5 out of the last 7 days. Consistency is key!

weekWarrior.title: Week Warrior
weekWarrior.description: You've logged 10+ receipts this week. You're on fire!

cleanSheet.title: Clean Sheet
cleanSheet.description: Amazing! You've kept all your goal spending under €80 this month.

goalCrusher.title: Goal Crusher
goalCrusher.description: You've maintained 2+ goal streaks for a week. Incredible discipline!

highRoller.title: High Roller
highRoller.description: You've made a purchase over €100. Remember to track big expenses!

bigSpender.title: Big Spender
bigSpender.description: Whoa! A €200+ purchase. Make sure it aligns with your goals.

pennyPincher.title: Penny Pincher
pennyPincher.description: You've made 10+ small purchases under €10. Every penny counts!

weekendWarrior.title: Weekend Warrior
weekendWarrior.description: You've tracked expenses on the weekend. Stay consistent!

earlyBird.title: Early Bird
earlyBird.description: Welcome aboard! You've logged your first 5 receipts.

veteran.title: Veteran
veteran.description: You've tracked 50 receipts! You're a TrueTrack veteran.

centurion.title: Centurion
centurion.description: Legendary! 100 receipts tracked. You're a tracking master!

coparentHero.title: Co-Parent Hero
coparentHero.description: You've tracked 30+ custody days! You're committed to co-parenting excellence.

calendarKeeper.title: Calendar Keeper
calendarKeeper.description: You've started adding activities to your custody calendar. Great organization!

activityPlanner.title: Activity Planner
activityPlanner.description: You've planned 10+ activities for your child. You're an amazing parent!

fairShare.title: Fair Share
fairShare.description: Your spending equity is within 10% of 50/50. Fair and balanced!

harmonyKeeper.title: Harmony Keeper
harmonyKeeper.description: Your harmony score is 80+! You're maintaining excellent co-parenting relations.

childFirst.title: Child First
childFirst.description: You've tracked 20+ child-related expenses. Your child comes first!

eventMaster.title: Event Master
eventMaster.description: You've planned 3+ special events (birthdays, school). Creating memories!

healthConscious.title: Health Conscious
healthConscious.description: You've spent €50+ on health. Investing in wellness!

educationInvestor.title: Education Investor
educationInvestor.description: You've invested €100+ in education. Knowledge is power!

budgetForecast.title: Budget Forecast
budgetForecast.description: Based on your current spending velocity, we project a Month End total of €{{projected}}.
budgetForecast.insightOver: You are on track to exceed your budget by €{{overage}}.
budgetForecast.insightUnder: You are comfortably on track to stay under budget.

receiptProcessed.title: Receipt Processed
receiptProcessed.description: We just added a receipt from {{storeName}} for €{{amount}}.
receiptProcessed.insight: Your dashboard has been updated with the latest figures.

budgetAlert.title: Budget Alert
budgetAlert.description: You have exceeded your monthly budget of €{{budget}}.
budgetAlert.insight: Consider pausing non-essential spending for the rest of the month.

dailySpending.title: Daily Spending Average
dailySpending.description: You are spending an average of €{{dailyAvg}} every day this month. To stay within your €{{budget}} budget, try to keep this under €{{target}}.
dailySpending.insightOver: You are pacing to overspend. Try having one "No Spend Day" this week.
dailySpending.insightUnder: Great job! Your daily pacing is sustainable.

topCategories.title: Top Categories
topCategories.description: Your spending is heavily concentrated in {{category}}. Diversifying or reducing this category is the fastest way to save.
topCategories.insight: Check if these are essential or discretionary expenses.

biggestPurchase.title: Biggest Purchase
biggestPurchase.description: Your largest single transaction was at {{storeName}} on {{date}}.
biggestPurchase.insight: Large one-off purchases can derail a budget quickly. Plan for these in advance.

weekendVsWeekday.title: Weekend vs Weekday
weekendVsWeekday.description: {{percent}}% of your spending happens on weekends (Sat/Sun).
weekendVsWeekday.insightHigh: You have a "Weekend Splurge" habit. Try to stick to your routine on Saturdays.
weekendVsWeekday.insightBalanced: Your spending is fairly balanced throughout the week.

spendingFrequency.title: Spending Frequency
spendingFrequency.description: On average, you make {{frequency}} transactions per day.
spendingFrequency.insightHigh: High frequency often indicates impulsive micro-transactions. Try to batch your purchases.
spendingFrequency.insightLow: Low frequency suggests planned, deliberate spending.

coParenting.title: Custody Calendar
coParenting.inviteDesc: Send an invite to share this calendar.

messages.clientOpened: Email client opened! Send the invitation to {{email}}
messages.inviteFailed: Failed to open email client. Please invite manually.
messages.linkCopied: Link copied! Send it via iMessage or WhatsApp for best results.

coParenting.emailBody:
Hi there!

I'd like to invite you to share our co-parenting calendar on TrueTrack.

TrueTrack helps us manage custody schedules, track expenses, and stay organized.

To join:
1. Download TrueTrack from the App Store
2. Create an account with this email: {{email}}
3. We'll be automatically connected!

Looking forward to better co-parenting together!

Best regards
coParenting.analysisSubtitle: Deep dive into your schedule dynamics

advice.thrivingDesc: You're nailing this. The consistency you're providing is the best gift for your child. Keep doing exactly what you're doing.
advice.criticalDesc: To be honest, this schedule looks chaotic. The inconsistency is likely causing stress for everyone involved. You need to sit down and agree on a fixed diverse routine.
advice.imbalanceDesc: The load is not being shared. One parent is doing the heavy lifting, which leads to burnout and resentment. Re-negotiate the weekends.
advice.erraticDesc: The days are flipping too randomly. Kids crave predictability. Try to stick to a 2-2-3 or week-on/week-off pattern.
advice.progressDesc: Things are okay, but there's room to tighten up the routine. Watch out for last-minute changes.

tour.welcomeDesc: Your intelligent expense tracker with ambient awareness.
tour.ambientDesc: The background glow changes color based on your budget health. Green is good, Red needs attention.
tour.cardsDesc: Tap any card to see more details. Try swiping items in the History view to delete them!
tour.navDesc: Quickly switch between scanning receipts, viewing history, and managing settings.
